scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const entries=['index.html','manifest.webmanifest','sw.js','src','icons']; fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); for (const entry of entries) fs.cpSync(entry,'dist/'+entry,{recursive:true});"
scripts.check: node --check src/standalone.js && node --check api/ask.js && node --check sw.js
